Px

PixelPhoto Studio

Local-only control for models, providers, prompts & batch renames

Connecting…
Install PixelPhoto for quick access from your dock or home screen.

Connection & model

Uses the same config file as the CLI: ~/.config/pixelphoto/config.json

Prompt & presets

Quick preview

Drop a single image to see the slug this prompt would produce (no files renamed).

Drop an image here or click to choose

JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF

Batch rename (folder)

Enter an absolute path on this machine. The server runs locally as your user.
